drl:
rule "R2"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    $p2_0 : T0()
then
    insert(new T1(3.5, $p2_0.getF1(), $p2_0.isF2(), true));
end
rule "R3"
salience -3
when
    T1()
    T1()
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
end
name: bd_d3
_finding: min_5150 with the receiver made LAZY (no-loop dropped): both sides evaluate the self-join once after both inserts. Splits the eager-skip mechanism from a join-emission-order mechanism.
